texto: A verse from a short poem - 'Philosophy is Forestry's Child' - in my Foreword:Ask not which came first, the acorn or the oak.We came as children of the forest;First our wooden cradle, then our kindling for industry.Instead think forward –– trees will shelter us from ourselves.
explicacao: Citação de Gabriel Hemery sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “A verse from a short poem - 'Philosophy is Forestry's Child' - in my Foreword:Ask not which came …” articula reflexao, nature, philosopyhy em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como philosopyhy e poem.
